app_info.subtitle: Generate test data
app_info.description: MockHero helps developers and AI coding agents estimate cost, create a loginless Polar checkout, claim an API key after payment, and generate realistic synthetic JSON, CSV, or SQL test data from schemas, templates, or plain-English prompts. It is built for seed data, fixtures, demos, and QA datasets, including relational records with valid foreign keys.

justifications.read_only_justification: Can validate a MockHero API key and update the key's last-used timestamp while computing a usage estimate.
justifications.open_world_justification: Does not submit external forms, publish content, or change third-party systems.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete data, overwrite data, revoke access, or perform irreversible account actions.

justifications.read_only_justification: Creates a pending MockHero agent checkout and a Polar Checkout session for the supplied billing email.
justifications.open_world_justification: Creates checkout state in Polar, a third-party Merchant of Record checkout system.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not charge the customer, delete data, revoke access, or perform an irreversible action by itself.

justifications.read_only_justification: Only looks up the private checkout status for a claim token and returns the current state.
justifications.open_world_justification: Does not publish content, submit external forms, or update third-party systems.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete data, overwrite data, revoke access, or perform irreversible account actions.

justifications.read_only_justification: Creates a private MockHero agent profile and API key, then marks the paid checkout as claimed.
justifications.open_world_justification: Changes only MockHero private account records and does not publish or submit to third-party systems.
justifications.destructive_justification: Provisions access rather than deleting data, revoking access, or overwriting existing API keys.

justifications.read_only_justification: Generates synthetic records and records rate-limit, usage, and billing-related activity for the authenticated API key.
justifications.open_world_justification: Can report billable agent usage to Polar and can trigger configured generation webhooks for Scale users.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete data, overwrite user data, revoke access, or perform destructive admin actions.

justifications.read_only_justification: Generates synthetic template records and records rate-limit, usage, and billing-related activity for the authenticated API key.
justifications.open_world_justification: Can report billable agent usage to Polar and can trigger configured generation webhooks for Scale users.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete data, overwrite user data, revoke access, or perform destructive admin actions.

justifications.read_only_justification: Requires API-key validation, which updates the key's last-used timestamp before returning an inferred schema.
justifications.open_world_justification: Does not publish content, submit external forms, or update third-party systems.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete data, overwrite data, revoke access, or perform irreversible account actions.

justifications.read_only_justification: Only returns the public MockHero field type catalog without changing records.
justifications.open_world_justification: Does not submit external forms, publish content, or change third-party systems.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete data, overwrite data, revoke access, or perform irreversible account actions.

justifications.read_only_justification: Only returns MockHero's public template list without changing records.
justifications.open_world_justification: Does not submit external forms, publish content, or change third-party systems.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete data, overwrite data, revoke access, or perform irreversible account actions.

test_cases.description: Estimate agent-plan cost before generating records.
test_cases.user_prompt: Use MockHero to estimate the cost of generating 200 user records after I already used 450 records today.
test_cases.expected_output: Returns the daily free allowance, billable records, billable 100-record units, and estimated dollar cost.

test_cases.description: Discover supported schema options before building test data.
test_cases.user_prompt: What MockHero field types and built-in templates can I use for realistic app seed data?
test_cases.expected_output: Summarizes supported field types and lists the ecommerce, blog, SaaS, and social templates.

test_cases.description: Convert a SQL table definition into a MockHero schema.
test_cases.user_prompt: Convert this SQL into a MockHero schema: CREATE TABLE users (id uuid primary key, email text not null, created_at timestamp);
test_cases.expected_output: Returns a MockHero schema with a users table and appropriate generated field types.

test_cases.description: Generate relational JSON test data from a structured schema.
test_cases.user_prompt: Generate 5 users and 10 orders as JSON with valid user_id references from orders to users.
test_cases.expected_output: Returns generated JSON when an API key is available, or explains how to create checkout and claim a key when one is not available.

test_cases.description: Create the loginless agent checkout and explain the claim flow.
test_cases.user_prompt: Run the MockHero agent purchase flow for buyer@example.com: create a checkout, then after I complete payment, use the returned claim token to check status and claim the API key.
test_cases.expected_output: Creates a Polar checkout URL, checks the returned claim token, and only claims the API key after Polar marks the checkout paid.

negative_test_cases.description: Do not trigger for production data anonymization requests.
negative_test_cases.user_prompt: Anonymize this real customer export and guarantee it meets regulated de-identification requirements.
negative_test_cases.expected_output: The app should not be invoked because MockHero generates synthetic test data and does not provide regulated anonymization guarantees.

negative_test_cases.description: Do not trigger for unrelated billing account management.
negative_test_cases.user_prompt: Show me my Polar invoices and cancel my subscription.
negative_test_cases.expected_output: The app should not be invoked because it can create MockHero agent checkout sessions but cannot manage Polar invoices or cancel subscriptions.

negative_test_cases.description: Do not trigger for broad application scaffolding without a mock-data request.
negative_test_cases.user_prompt: Build me a full CRM app with authentication, dashboards, and deployment.
negative_test_cases.expected_output: The app should not be invoked unless the user specifically asks for synthetic records, fixtures, schema detection, templates, usage estimates, or MockHero checkout.
